title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLXIV. Love And Matrimony.
content:
Jack Sprat could eat no fat,
        His wife could eat no lean;
        And so, betwixt them both, you see,
        They lick'd the platter clean.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLXIV. Love And Matrimony."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
